title: alchemilla ellenbergiana
intro: Alchemilla ellenbergiana is a perennial plant species in the Rosaceae family, commonly known as Ellenberg's lady's mantle or maidenhair spleenwort. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla ellenbergiana, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to exploit its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
